body_excerpt: In DMPixelLogger_ProcessDmCommand of DMPixelLogger.cpp, there is a possible out of bounds read due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to remote information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
